description_long: This is a compact, vintage-style airplane with a short, robust fuselage and a single large wooden propeller mounted at the nose. The wings are straight and positioned low on the body, with a slightly weathered, camouflage paint scheme featuring green, brown, and gray tones. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer adorned with a black cross insignia, and a horizontal stabilizer with a similar motif. The cockpit is situated near the front of the fuselage and appears to be open, with a small windshield and visible seat. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tail wheel, all fixed and exposed. The overall design is reminiscent of early 20th-century military aircraft, likely inspired by World War I-era biplanes.
description: A compact, vintage military-style airplane with a wooden propeller, low straight wings, and a camouflage paint scheme. Features an open cockpit and fixed landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large wooden propeller, open cockpit, and symmetrical low wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the short fuselage, camouflage paint, and fixed landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the single vertical stabilizer with cross insignia and the tail wheel.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the propeller, cockpit, and tail design.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with no visible dihedral or winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open cockpit with a single seat and small windshield.
